user.description: Please enter connection settings of your Aqara Gateway.

discovery_confirm.description: Do you want to add the Aqara Gateway `{name}` to Home Assistant?
discovery_confirm.title: Discovered Aqara Gateway

vrf.title: VRF Indoor Units
vrf.description: Enter DIP switch IDs (1-64) for each VRF indoor unit, separated by commas (max 10). Example: 8, 9, 10, 11. If you don't have a VRF device, leave as -1 and submit.
